hero.heading: How to Get Started
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to enroll your practice in the Mortensen Medical Research Network and begin contributing to observational peptide research.

intro: Joining PeptidePure™ as a credentialed clinician gives you access to wholesale peptide pricing, IRB-approved observational protocols, and the clinical data infrastructure of the Mortensen Medical Research Network (MMRN). Follow the steps below to get fully onboarded.

steps.title: Create Your Clinician Account
steps.text: Register at peptidepure.com/account with your professional email. You will be asked to provide your NPI number, state license number, and credential type (MD, DO, PA-C, NP, ND, etc.).
items: Upload a copy of your state medical license during registration.
Your application is reviewed within 1–2 business days.
Upon approval, you will receive a welcome email with your wholesale access credentials.

steps.title: Review the IRB Protocol
steps.text: All clinicians who order through PeptidePure™ are invited (not required) to enroll in the IRB-approved Mortensen Medical Research Network observational registry under Protocol MMRN-001-2025.
items: Download and review the full protocol document below.
The IRB is centrally managed by the Institute of Regenerative and Cellular Medicine (IRCM).
Participation is voluntary. Enrollment does not create an employment or agency relationship.

steps.title: Obtain Patient Informed Consent
steps.text: Before enrolling any patient in the observational registry, you must obtain written informed consent using the MMRN-approved consent template. A sample consent form is available for download below.
items: The consent form covers: purpose of the registry, data collected, voluntary nature, withdrawal rights, and HIPAA authorization.
Signed consent forms must be retained in the patient chart for a minimum of 7 years.
De-identified data only is submitted to the registry — no patient-identifiable information is transmitted to Peptide Pure LLC.

steps.title: Set Up onzen.health Data Capture
steps.text: Participating clinicians use the onzen.health platform to capture structured treatment and outcome data. Your account will be provisioned after practice enrollment is confirmed.
items: Log in at onzen.health with the credentials provided in your welcome email.
Complete the 30-minute onzen.health onboarding tutorial before entering patient data.
Data must be submitted within 14 days of each patient visit per MMRN-001-2025 protocol.
Contact dr.elaine@peptidepure.com with any protocol or data capture questions.

steps.title: Place Your First Order
steps.text: Once your account is approved, you can browse wholesale inventory, add items to your cart, and check out. A $1,000 minimum order applies.
items: All prices are displayed at clinician wholesale rates after login.
Orders ship Monday–Friday, excluding U.S. holidays.
Tracking information is emailed when your order ships.
For orders under $1,000, contact info@peptidepure.com for manual processing.

steps.title: Submit Clinical Data & Track Outcomes
steps.text: Use the IRB forms in your account to submit baseline assessments, treatment logs, adverse event reports, and patient outcome reports.
items: IRB — Baseline: Complete within 7 days of enrolling a patient.
IRB — Treatment Log: Submit after each treatment visit.
IRB — AE/SAE Report: Submit within 24 hours of any adverse event.
Patient Outcomes: Submit 90-day and 180-day follow-up reports.

items.title: MMRN-001-2025 Protocol Summary
items.description: Overview of the observational registry design, data collection requirements, and adverse event reporting obligations.
